title: Hermes Mobile stellar overhaul July 11 — 6 distinct screenshots, no dogfood, feature graphic v2, 22s video
body: I run AI coding agents on my own computer...
comment:
Android live on Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.iganapolsky.hermesmobile&utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=organic&utm_campaign=stellar-july-14
Source + gateway setup: https://github.com/IgorGanapolsky/mac-yolo-safeguards/tree/main/hermes-mobile
Free tier: chat + connection health + QR pair. Leash Pro $19.99/mo for gate rules + ThumbGate memory (10/week free). iOS in review, not public yet (Apple lookup resultCount 0).

verification.proofMethod: Chrome via osascript + base64 eval, sharebox preload, execCommand insertText, Post button click, comment submit via button.comments-comment-box__submit-button--cr
